parent_lane: G2.206 data-quality market_data_adapter.py compatibility facade ownership decision

authorized_future_shape.constructor_contract: MarketDataSourceAdapter must preserve the existing positional config argument and may add keyword-only optional quality_monitor/provider parameters.
authorized_future_shape.default_behavior: Default construction must keep current singleton fallback behavior.
authorized_future_shape.injected_behavior: When an injected monitor/provider is supplied, _trigger_quality_monitoring must use it and must not call the module-level get_data_quality_monitor getter.
authorized_future_shape.factory_compatibility: data_source_factory must remain able to instantiate MarketDataSourceAdapter(config.__dict__) without source edits.
authorized_future_shape.import_contract: The app.services.market_data_adapter module path and MarketDataSourceAdapter class name must remain valid.

required_future_tdd.red: A new focused test must fail before implementation because injected monitor/provider is not accepted or not used.
required_future_tdd.green: Focused tests must pass after the provider seam is implemented.

required_future_gitnexus.pre_commit_detection: run gitnexus detect_changes on staged scope before commit

non_goals: data_source_factory source edits in the future implementation unless separately authorized
